corrections.note: Middle point present after ὑποδημάτων in the image.

corrections.current: ἐν λέουσιν ἔπαιξεν ὡς ἐν ἐρίφοις,
corrections.correct: ἐν λέουσιν ἔπαιζεν ὡς ἐν ἐρίφοις,
corrections.note: Printed text reads ἔπαιζεν, not ἔπαιξεν.
Printed form is future indicative ἀνυψώσει, not infinitive ἀνυψῶσαι.

corrections.current: ειληφα B*b AC (.. λαφα]) ειληφεν Babℵc a
corrections.correct: ειληφα B*b AC (.. λαφα]) ειληφεν Babℵc.a
corrections.note: Correct siglum punctuation is ℵc.a, not separated as ℵc a.
The variant is ἐπροφήτευσε, split across the printed line; transcript dropped the prefix.
Parenthetical note reads -τια C, not -ται C.
No correction to text content here; included only to note that preceding line break handling is correct.
Hyphenated line break is correctly represented; no substantive correction needed.
Second variant is ηνεσεν, not ηνεσαν.

notes: Body includes marginal verse numerals and page number appropriately separated from text. Two drafted apparatus entries in the supplied transcription were actually correct except for line-break/punctuation; only substantive errors should be applied.
